top_signals.title: Spain Lifts 2026 Economic-Growth Forecast Despite Iran War
top_signals.summary: Spain will continue to outperform the euro area’s largest economies, with the conflict in Iran expected to have only a limited impact, according to new government forecasts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia's Firmus announces Nvidia-backed 'AI factory' in Indonesia
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: COSCO inks MOU for Coatings for 125 Bulk Carriers
top_signals.summary: Jotun COSCO Marine Coatings signs agreement covering 125 newbuilding vessels with COSCO SHIPPINGJotun COSCO Marine Coatings (JCMC) participated in the Global Partners Conference held by COSCO SHIPPING (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd. and COSCO Shipping (Hainan) Co., Ltd.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
